expectedAnswers: It was delicious, thanks! Can I get the check?
Everything was great—I'd like to settle the bill now.
The food was awesome! Could you bring the bill, please?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否在赞美后自然提出结账请求
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当（如使用 check/bill）
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语节奏，避免生硬直译
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个场景关键词（check/bill/settle）

content.speakerText: Can I get the bill, please?
expectedAnswers: Sure, I'll bring it right away.
Of course! Will you be paying together or separately?
Absolutely! Do you prefer card or cash?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应结账请求并提供下一步信息
语言准确性：使用正确动词（bring, pay, split）和句型
表达自然度：语气礼貌，符合服务员角色，避免机械重复
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个服务场景关键词（split, card, cash, bring）
